text:
Owner-curated ROPECRAFT resource
The supplied directory recommends ROPECRAFT as a United States rope convention resource: https://ropecraft.net/.
The inspected site describes education for tops, bottoms, and switches across Western bondage, Kinbaku, Shibari, solo tying, power exchange, and health or wellness, with fundamentals for beginners and advanced material for experienced attendees. It says in-person events integrate consent culture and diversity and include a participant-driven Ropenspace, peer support, special-interest groups, dedicated practice and self-tying spaces, nightly parties, custom frames and equipment, and a vendor bazaar.
title: Owner-curated ROPECRAFT resource
